data.name: The Session
data.detailed_description:
Step into an intimate visual novel that blends psychology, passion, and mystery.
In this story, you’ll experience a complete 60-minute journey of a therapist and his patient, where professional boundaries fade and emotions take over.

🖤 Key Features:
• Full HD rendered scenes powered by Daz Studio
• Immersive narrative with multiple dialogue paths
• Cinematic sound design and ambient music
• Adult (18+) content with full nudity and erotic themes
• English-only version provided for review and testing purposes

Developed by Magicstick Studio
Published by Magicstick Studio
data.about_the_game:
Step into an intimate visual novel that blends psychology, passion, and mystery.
In this story, you’ll experience a complete 60-minute journey of a therapist and his patient, where professional boundaries fade and emotions take over.

🖤 Key Features:
• Full HD rendered scenes powered by Daz Studio
• Immersive narrative with multiple dialogue paths
• Cinematic sound design and ambient music
• Adult (18+) content with full nudity and erotic themes
• English-only version provided for review and testing purposes

Developed by Magicstick Studio
Published by Magicstick Studio
data.short_description: A mature, story-driven visual novel where a therapist and his patient slowly cross the line between professionalism and desire. Experience a tense, intimate 60-minute session that blends psychology, passion, and cinematic storytelling.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics (Intel HD 4000 or equivalent)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound card
  • VR 支援: None
  • 備註: Runs best on 1080p display. Keyboard and mouse recommended.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 8000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1050 / AMD Radeon RX 560 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound card
  • VR 支援: None
  • 備註: Recommended for Full HD (1080p) experience.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 High Sierra or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) via native + Rosetta compatibility
  • 記憶體: 4000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU supporting Metal (Intel/AMD/Apple)
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any standard macOS-compatible audio device
  • 備註: Game is fully playable on both Intel and Apple Silicon systems.
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11 Big Sur or newer
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon M1 or newer / Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Apple M-series GPU or AMD Radeon
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard macOS audio
  • 備註: Runs best on Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3).

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.0 / Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.3 compatible GPU (Nvidia/AMD/Intel with latest drivers)
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any Linux-compatible audio device
  • VR 支援: Not supported
  • 備註: Requires 64-bit Linux distribution.
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.0 / Ubuntu 22.04 LTS or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 8000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.0 or Vulkan-compatible GPU
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard Linux audio
  • VR 支援: Not supported
  • 備註: Tested on Steam Deck (runs smoothly).

  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • Memory: 4000 MB RAM

  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 1500 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX-compatible sound card

  • Additional Notes: Runs best on 1080p display. Keyboard and mouse recommended.
